# af completions <shell> emits a valid completion script per shell.

exec af completions bash
stdout 'bash completion'

exec af completions zsh
stdout '#compdef'

exec af completions fish
stdout 'complete -c af'

exec af completions powershell
stdout 'Register-ArgumentCompleter'

! exec af completions tcsh
stderr 'tcsh'

! exec af completions
stderr 'arg'
